title: Cobblecreate
description:
[Archived]
Cobblecreate aims to combine Cobblemon and the Create mod while keeping it vanilla+.
body:
Cobblecreate aims to combine Cobblemon and the Create mod while keeping it close to vanilla.

Cobblecreate was meant to be played in multiplayer but works perfectly in single player as well.

  • Cosmetics!
    Cobblecreate adds a few player customization mods like Cosmetica, Simple Hats and 3D player skins
  • Immersive!
    Immersion is the key to a having fun playing. That's why the pack focuses to enhance the simple ambience Minecraft has to offer.
  • Fun in groups!
    Cobblecreate was meant to be played in multiplayer. Sharing your adventure with your friend makes the trip more memorable!
